title: Include Board Discussions in Search Everywhere
excerpt:
Description
Was excited to find the Board Discussions feature (never saw it) and thought great, we can cancel Slack! Nope. 
Search Everywhere is not actually everywhere.

posts.author: mikecsea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Was excited to find the Board Discussions feature (never saw it) and thought great, we can cancel Slack! Nope.

Search Everywhere is not actually everywhere.

Please update the search function to actually be everywhere.

What are you trying to achieve

A better search function that includes ALL data in the account.

posts.author: Kim3 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely have noticed this issue on our team too - we don’t use slack but the everywhere feature is definitely not everywhere.
